steps.t: Ethel Applegarth, the Scholar's Guild-leader, is in the Guild-hall in Rivendell. The Master of Crafting Guilds has instructed you to speak with Ethel …
Melongene Took is in the Scholar's Guild-hall in Rivendell. Ethel Applegarth has directed you to speak with Melongene to look at what recipes she sell…
Spiall is in the Scholar's Guild-hall in Rivendell. Ethel Applegarth has directed you to speak with Spiall to look at what recipes he sells.
